name: Bond
tagline: Multi-tenant automation platform for AI-powered omnichannel messaging
description: Bond is a multi-tenant automation platform that enables businesses to create intelligent chatbot workflows responding to messages from WhatsApp, Instagram, Facebook, and other channels via Chatwoot integration. Each automation features configurable AI agents with custom prompts, knowledge bases, tool calling, and inter-agent transfer rules.
highlights: Multi-agent AI system with inter-agent transfer and tool calling capabilities
Omnichannel support via Chatwoot: WhatsApp, Instagram, Facebook, and more
Multi-tenant architecture with per-client AI model configuration
Real-time WebSocket server for live message processing (Docker-deployed)
Web scraping engine for real estate listings (CasaWeb, MercadoLibre, InfoCasas, RE/MAX)
aiDetails: Built with Claude Code (CLAUDE.md present, multiple AI-related commits detected)
